title: Syracuse University appoints Coast Guard veteran as new chief of campus safety
summary: Syracuse University appointed Michael J. Bunker, a U.S. Coast Guard veteran and experienced campus safety leader, as its new chief of campus safety and emergency services management, effective July 1, 2025. Bunker brings innovation in safety practices including mental health response teams, body cameras, and AI-enhanced security systems from his tenure at the University of Denver. His appointment represents a leadership transition as predecessor Craig Stone retires after 40 years in law enforcement.
department_refs: Syracuse University Campus Safety and Emergency Services Management

political_signal.description: Appointment emphasizes institutional commitment to modernized campus safety practices, mental health integration, and technology adoption—areas aligned with contemporary public safety innovation priorities.
